name: AI Resume Builder
description: Create professional resumes quickly using AI tools with templates, formatting help, and export options for different job applications.

name: Portfolio Generator
description: Build beautiful and responsive portfolios easily with customizable layouts, modern designs, and tools to showcase your work professionally online.

name: Cover Letter AI
description: Generate personalized cover letters instantly using AI suggestions tailored to job roles, improving your chances of getting noticed by recruiters.

name: Job Tracker Pro
description: Manage and track all your job applications in one place with reminders, status updates, and analytics to monitor your progress effectively.

name: LinkedIn Optimizer
description: Enhance your LinkedIn profile visibility with smart keyword suggestions, profile analysis, and tips to attract recruiters and grow your network.

name: Interview Coach AI
description: Practice interviews with AI-driven simulations, receive instant feedback, and improve your communication skills to perform confidently in real interviews.

name: Skill Assessment Tool
description: Evaluate your professional skills through tests and detailed reports, helping you identify strengths and areas that need improvement for growth.

name: Freelance Proposal Writer
description: Write effective freelance proposals using templates and smart suggestions to impress clients and increase your chances of winning projects.

name: Career Path Finder
description: Discover suitable career paths based on your interests and skills with insights, trends, and guidance for long-term professional success.

name: Certification Planner
description: Plan and manage your certification goals with structured roadmaps, reminders, and progress tracking to stay organized and achieve milestones efficiently.
